_comment: Cross-source name variants -> FIFA code. The 48 canonical name_en values in teams.json are mapped automatically; this file only holds the KNOWN divergent spellings used by martj42, football-data.org, etc. Matching is accent/case/punctuation-insensitive (see normalize.slugify), so 'Curacao' already resolves via the canonical 'Curaçao' — entries here are for genuinely different names. Add a row whenever scripts/fetch_data.py reports an unmapped name.
